designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — spatial canvas with tactile nodes, gradient hero headers, animated floating elements, and adaptive light/dark theming

features: Flow Canvas with animated, floating snippet nodes and bezier curve connections
Adaptive AI Snippet Stream with personalized content cards
Community Flow Gallery with like, bookmark, and remix actions
Conversational AI Co-Pilot with typing indicator and quick suggestion chips
Light/dark theme toggle accessible from every screen
Node type palette (Video, Text, Audio, Image) with per-type color coding
Progress tracking per flow with animated progress bars
FAB for adding new nodes with slide-up type picker
